name: Coinbase
interviewFormat: 4-5 rounds: phone screen, 2 coding, 1 system design, 1 behavioral — crypto/blockchain domain knowledge expected
questionPatterns: design a cryptocurrency exchange order book
explain how proof of work vs proof of stake differs
design a KYC / AML compliance system
how would you handle a wallet balance discrepancy at scale
tell me about a time you worked in a highly regulated environment
